title: Podman images not listing using `podman images`
body:
### Issue Description

I'm not sure if this belongs here or on Podman Desktop but since the "deficiency" is with the CLI, I'm choosing to open an issue here.

I am currently switching from Docker to Podman and Podman Desktop shows all my Docker images. However, unlike Docker, the Podman desktop > Images differs from `podman images`. The former shows all my Docker images but the latter produces an empty output. I expect it to reproduce the output of `docker images` but it does not.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. View list of images in Docker Desktop; compare it to list of images in Podman Desktop
2. View list of images using `docker images`, compare it to list of images using `podman desktop`
3. See the discrepancy in 2 but not in 1.


### Describe the results you received

I don't see my docker images listed using `podman images`

### Describe the results you expected

I expect the results of `docker images` to match `podman images` especially since Podman Desktop shows all images seen in Docker Desktop

### podman info output

### Privileged Or Rootless

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
The podman cli will only show actual podman images, it has no idea about docker. The podman remote cli is only designed to work against a podman server. Espcially as there is no way for us to use a docker images it would make no sense at all to list them there.

You need to pull images with podman in order to see them in podman images. 


Podman Desktop is a client tool and connect to several backends including docker so it can list you all images for all backends
